title: Golden Exalt
content:
This is the Second of the four special Titles that exist within the Void Tribulant stage. This title refer to people at Peak Late Stage Of 
Void Tribulant
, these people were infinitely close to peak 
Void Tribulant
 but weren’t able to cross the gap.

Notable Members
[
]

Esteemed Green Bull

The 
Devil Dao Sect
's sect master of 
Green Devil Continent
